paper/figures/fig_robust_gap_surface.pdf.panels: Left: baseline accuracy across easy/mid/hard tiers. Right: entangling branch accuracy vs eta by tier.
paper/figures/fig_robust_gap_surface.pdf.takeaway: Non-easy tiers show modest but non-universal parity-locked gains; uncertainty can erase support in high-noise cells.
paper/figures/fig_robust_gap_surface.pdf.uncertainty: Tier-level CI values are reported in table_parity_tiers.tex and derived from bootstrap over seeds/noise/shot cells.

paper/figures/fig_entanglement_frontier..panels: Left: tau heatmap over (eta,S). Right: tier/policy tau means with CI whiskers.
paper/figures/fig_entanglement_frontier..takeaway: Entanglement benefit is regime-dependent; several high-noise or low-shot strata are unresolved.
paper/figures/fig_entanglement_frontier..uncertainty: Bootstrap confidence intervals define unresolved frontier cells where zero is included.

paper/figures/fig_rho_noise_frontier.pdf.panels: Left: rho(eta) trajectories by tier. Right: undefined-ratio bins by operator policy.
paper/figures/fig_rho_noise_frontier.pdf.takeaway: Operator-attribution dominance weakens with noise and becomes undefined near small denominators.
paper/figures/fig_rho_noise_frontier.pdf.uncertainty: Undefined-bin handling is explicit; eta_c crossing uses CI-aware interpretation in table_effect_decomposition.tex.

paper/figures/fig_counterexample_stress..panels: Single panel: false-advantage rate vs label shuffle under compliant/leaked PCA modes.
paper/figures/fig_counterexample_stress..takeaway: Leakage detector is sensitive by construction; intentional leakage sharply inflates false advantage.
paper/figures/fig_counterexample_stress..uncertainty: Stress outcomes are deterministic controls and reported with accompanying falsification matrix tables.
